definition: The abode of stars (GEN 15:5, DEU 4:19, PSA 8:3, etc.) (astronomical; modern: the universe)
The entire planet (GEN 1:1) (planetary; modern: Earth)
The waters below and the waters above (GEN 1:7) (geographic component; modern: the oceans and the atmosphere)
Seas (GEN 1:10), waters below the heavens (GEN 1:9) (geographic component; modern: oceas, seas (lakes?))
Some location in Eden (geographic region; modern: uncertain)
Various theories exist including locations in the Seychelles, Armenia, and others (geographic region; modern: uncertain)
Various theories exist including Wadi Baysh, Persian Gulf, and others (river; modern: uncertain)

The gold of that land is good; the bdellium and the onyx stone are there (GEN 2:12).  Various theories exist regarding modern equivalents including locations in Babylonia, Arabia, and others. (geographic region; modern: uncertain)
It flows around the whole land of Cush (GEN 2:13).  Various theories exist about modern equivalents including the Nile River, Gihon Spring, and others. (river; modern: uncertain)
First mention: GEN 2:13.  Various theories exist regarding modern equivalents including Ethiopia or locations in Babylonia. (geographic region; modern: uncertain)
It flows east of Assyria (GEN 2:14) (river; modern: Tigris River)
